name: data-pipeline-harness
description: Generates seed data, inserts into SQLite, runs pipeline transformations, and validates output integrity.
author: Megan Wall

scripts.test: node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --test test/db.test.js test/seeder.test.js test/transformer/normalize.test.js test/transformer/aggregate.test.js test/transformer/stage.test.js test/validator.test.js test/pipeline.integration.test.js
